'''gayapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tgirl|tgirl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tgirl|tgirl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gayapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæyæpæth|gæyæpæth]] || [[word:gæyæpæj|gæyæpæj]] || [[word:gæyæpæsh|gæyæpæsh]] || [[word:gæyæpæ|gæyæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayayapath|gayayapath]] || [[word:gayayapaj|gayayapaj]] || [[word:gayayapash|gayayapash]] || [[word:gayayapa|gayayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayapath|gayapath]] || [[word:gayapaj|gayapaj]] || [[word:gayapash|gayapash]] || [[word:gayapa|gayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayafpath|gayafpath]] || [[word:gayafpaj|gayafpaj]] || [[word:gayafpash|gayafpash]] || [[word:gayafpaf|gayafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gayapatha|gayapatha]] || [[word:gayapaja|gayapaja]] || [[word:gayapasha|gayapasha]] || [[word:gayapaka|gayapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gayapath|gayapath]] || [[word:gayapaj|gayapaj]] || [[word:gayapash|gayapash]] || [[word:gayapa|gayapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gayapathal|gayapathal]] || [[word:gayapajal|gayapajal]] || [[word:gayapashal|gayapashal]] || [[word:gayapakal|gayapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gayapathatha|gayapathatha]] || [[word:gayapajaja|gayapajaja]] || [[word:gayapashasha|gayapashasha]] || [[word:gayapaka|gayapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gayapathan|gayapathan]] || [[word:gayapajan|gayapajan]] || [[word:gayapashan|gayapashan]] || [[word:gayapakan|gayapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gayapathaoro|gayapathaoro]] || [[word:gayapajaoro|gayapajaoro]] || [[word:gayapashaoro|gayapashaoro]] || [[word:gayapakaoro|gayapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
